UNVALIDATED RESEARCH PROTOTYPE. This report, and every measure in it, describes deterministic software behavior only. It is not, and must never be read, cited, or represented as, a clinical validity, safety, or regulatory determination of any kind.

EF Render Fixture (NOT a real module) render_fixture_v1

Read-only static render -- not a portal. No server, database, write path, or auth; generated only from already-committed repository artifacts (FR-8/OQ-3).

Review queue & turn state

Structural role-by-role act presence only, reusing the P1-T1/P1-T5 derived-state primitives (FR-11) — informational, not a substitute for `validate`/`status`'s fail-closed checks.

This program remains an unvalidated research prototype: no clinical sign-off exists for any module rendered here, and the reviewer roster stays synthetic-only until gate G1 clears (see the banner above for the full boundary statement).

TERMINAL — every required ADR-0004 role (FR-26's conditional adjudication requirement included) has a committed, effective review act on record for this module. Structural role-presence only — NOT a release-authorization, approval, or clinical-validity determination; see the Review records section below for each act's own chain-linkage and synthetic status.

This is the correct, by-design terminus for a fully synthetic:true record set (FR-6) -- not a defect.

  1. clinical-1

    Committed review act: rr-0001-clinical-1 (see Review records below).

  2. clinical-2

    Committed review act: rr-0002-clinical-2 (see Review records below).

  3. lab

    Committed review act: rr-0003-lab (see Review records below).

  4. adjudication

    Committed review act: rr-0004-adjudication (see Review records below).

  5. release-auth

    Committed review act: rr-0005-release-auth (see Review records below).

Review records

rr-0001-clinical-1 clinical-1

SYNTHETIC -- NOT A CREDENTIALED REVIEW ACT. This record exercises the review-record workflow only; it is not evidence that any named, credentialed human clinician reviewed this module, and it can never satisfy a release-authorization validity condition.

Reviewer
synthetic-fixture-clinical-1
Decision
approve
Rationale
Fixture-only synthetic dry-run rationale exercising the P2-T6 render verb -- not a real clinical review act. Pattern is consistent with the fixture traceability chain (FIXTURE-RULE-001).

request-changes
